1.1.1.title: Ensure Administrative accounts are cloud-only
1.1.1.description: Validate all global admins are cloud-only (no on-prem sync or guest accounts)

1.1.2.title: Ensure two emergency access accounts have been defined
commands: Get-MgUser -Filter "accountEnabled eq true" -Property UserPrincipalName,DisplayName | Where-Object {$_.DisplayName -match 'emergency|break.*glass|breakglass'} | Select-Object UserPrincipalName,DisplayName
1.1.2.description: Manual review - Check for emergency access break-glass accounts

1.1.3.title: Ensure that between two and four global admins are designated
1.1.3.description: Count the number of global administrators (target: 2-4)

1.1.4.title: Ensure administrative accounts use licenses with a reduced application footprint
commands: Get-MgUser -Filter "userType eq 'Member'" -Property UserPrincipalName,AssignedLicenses | Get-MgUserLicenseDetail | Where-Object {$_.SkuId -notmatch 'AAD_PREMIUM|STANDARDPACK|ENTERPRISEPREMIUM'} | Select-Object UserPrincipalName
1.1.4.description: Verify admin accounts don't have licenses with broad application access (E3/E5)

1.2.1.title: Ensure that only organizationally managed/approved public groups exist
commands: Get-MgGroup -Filter "visibility eq 'Public'" -Property Id | ForEach-Object {Get-MgGroupMember -GroupId $_.Id | Measure-Object | Select-Object Count}
1.2.1.description: List all public groups to verify they are organizationally managed

1.2.2.title: Ensure sign-in to shared mailboxes is blocked
commands: Get-EXOMailbox -RecipientTypeDetails SharedMailbox -ResultSize Unlimited | ForEach-Object {Get-MgUser -Filter "userPrincipalName eq '$($_.ExternalDirectoryObjectId)'" -Property AccountEnabled,UserPrincipalName} | Select-Object UserPrincipalName,AccountEnabled
1.2.2.description: Verify shared mailbox accounts have sign-in disabled

1.3.1.title: Ensure the 'Password expiration policy' is set to 'Set passwords to never expire'
1.3.1.description: Verify password expiration policy is set to never expire

1.3.2.title: Ensure 'Idle session timeout' is set to '3 hours (or less)' for unmanaged device
1.3.2.description: Verify idle session timeout is configured for 3 hours or less

1.3.3.title: Ensure 'External sharing' of calendars is not available
1.3.3.description: Verify external calendar sharing is disabled

1.3.4.title: Ensure 'User owned apps and services' is restricted
1.3.4.description: Verify users cannot install add-ins in Office applications

1.3.5.title: Ensure internal phishing protection for Forms is enabled
commands: Get-MgAuditLogAuditLog -Filter "activityDateTime ge $(Get-Date -Date '2024-06-01')" -Top 1000 | Where-Object {$_.Activity -eq 'Forms.PhishingProtectionDetected'} | Select-Object Activity,Result | Measure-Object
1.3.5.description: Verify Forms phishing protection is enabled through audit logs

1.3.6.title: Ensure the customer lockbox feature is enabled
1.3.6.description: Verify customer lockbox feature is enabled

1.3.7.title: Ensure 'third-party storage services' are restricted in 'Microsoft 365 on the web'
1.3.7.description: Verify third-party storage services are restricted

1.3.8.title: Ensure that Sways cannot be shared with people outside of your organization
1.3.8.description: Manual - Configure in SharePoint Admin Center: Settings > Sharing > Sway external sharing

1.3.9.title: Ensure shared bookings pages are restricted to select users
1.3.9.description: Verify shared bookings pages are restricted to internal users only

2.1.1.title: Ensure Safe Links for Office Applications is Enabled
2.1.1.description: Verify Safe Links protection is enabled for Office applications

2.1.2.title: Ensure the Common Attachment Types Filter is enabled
2.1.2.description: Verify common attachment types filter is enabled

2.1.3.title: Ensure notifications for internal users sending malware is Enabled
2.1.3.description: Verify malware notifications are enabled for internal users

2.1.4.title: Ensure Safe Attachments policy is enabled
2.1.4.description: Verify Safe Attachments policy exists and is enabled

2.1.5.title: Ensure Safe Attachments for SharePoint; OneDrive; and Microsoft Teams is Enabled
2.1.5.description: Verify ATP Safe Attachments is enabled for SPO/OneDrive/Teams

2.1.6.title: Ensure Exchange Online Spam Policies are set to notify administrators

2.1.7.title: Ensure that an anti-phishing policy has been created
2.1.7.description: Verify anti-phishing policy is configured and enabled

2.1.8.description: Verify SPF records exist for all accepted domains

2.1.9.description: Verify DKIM is enabled for all domains

2.1.10.description: Verify DMARC records are published for all domains

2.1.11.title: Ensure comprehensive attachment filtering is applied
2.1.11.description: Verify comprehensive attachment filtering is enabled

2.1.12.title: Ensure the connection filter IP allow list is not used
2.1.12.description: Verify IP allow list is not in use or is empty

2.1.13.title: Ensure the connection filter safe list is off
2.1.13.description: Verify connection filter safe list is disabled

2.1.14.title: Ensure inbound anti-spam policies do not contain allowed domains
2.1.14.description: Verify no domains are whitelisted in anti-spam policies

2.1.15.description: Verify outbound spam limits are configured

2.2.1.title: Ensure emergency access account activity is monitored
2.2.1.description: Monitor emergency account sign-ins and activity

2.4.1.title: Ensure Priority account protection is enabled and configured
2.4.1.description: Verify priority account protection settings are configured

2.4.3.description: Verify Defender for Cloud Apps and audit logging are enabled

3.1.1.title: Ensure Microsoft 365 audit log search is Enabled
3.1.1.description: Verify audit log search is enabled and functional

3.2.1.title: Ensure DLP policies are enabled
3.2.1.description: Verify DLP policies are created and enabled

3.2.2.description: Verify DLP policies extend to Teams channels and messages

3.2.3.description: Verify DLP policies are in enforce mode for Copilot protection

3.3.1.title: Ensure Information Protection sensitivity label policies are published
3.3.1.description: Verify sensitivity labels are configured and published

4.1.1.title: Ensure devices without a compliance policy are marked not compliant

4.2.1.title: Ensure device enrollment for personally owned devices is blocked by default
commands: Get-MgDeviceManagementDeviceEnrollmentConfiguration -Filter "displayName eq 'Default Device Enrollment Limit'" | Select-Object Restrictions
4.2.1.description: Verify personal device enrollment is blocked

5.1.2.title: Ensure 'Per-user MFA' is disabled
5.1.2.description: Verify per-user MFA is not being used (conditional access is preferred)

5.1.3.title: Ensure users cannot create security groups
5.1.3.description: Verify non-admins cannot create security groups

5.1.8.title: Ensure that password hash sync is enabled for hybrid deployments
5.1.8.description: Verify password hash sync is enabled (requires on-prem validation)

5.2.2.title: Ensure Conditional Access policies are configured
5.2.2.description: Verify conditional access policies are in place

5.2.4.title: Ensure 'Self service password reset enabled' is set to 'All'
5.2.4.description: Verify SSPR is enabled for all users

5.3.1.title: Ensure privileged role assignments are activated and not assigned
5.3.1.description: Verify role assignments use PIM for just-in-time activation

5.3.2.description: Verify access reviews are configured for guest users

5.3.5.description: Verify Privileged Role Admin activation requires approval

6.1.1.title: Ensure 'AuditDisabled' organizationally is set to 'False'
commands: Get-Mailbox -ResultSize Unlimited | Select-Object UserPrincipalName,AuditEnabled | Group-Object AuditEnabled
6.1.1.description: Verify mailbox audit logging is enabled organization-wide

6.1.2.title: Ensure mailbox audit actions are configured
6.1.2.description: Verify mailbox audit actions and retention are configured

6.1.3.title: Ensure 'AuditBypassEnabled' is not enabled on mailboxes
6.1.3.description: Verify audit bypass is not enabled on user mailboxes

6.2.1.description: Verify mail forwarding is disabled for all mailboxes
